task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Samsung 65" QN90B Neo QLED 4K TV (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2199.00 and wholesale is $1399.00. Product features: 4K UHD TV with Quantum Mini LED and Anti-Reflection technology. Reference: https://www.samsung.com/us/televisions-home-theater/tvs/samsung-neo-qled-4k/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Samsung 65" QN90B Neo QLED 4K TV. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Samsung 65" QN90B Neo QLED 4K TV. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
